message:
feat(c_interop): Full codec registry with UTF-16/32, CP1252 support

- Implement codec search function storage (register/unregister)
- Add UTF-16 encoding/decoding with BOM and endianness support
- Add UTF-32 encoding/decoding with BOM and endianness support
- Add CP1252/Windows-1252 codec with full 0x80-0x9F mapping
- Add Latin-1/ISO-8859-1 proper UTF-8 conversion
- Implement error handler registry (register/lookup)
- Wire cpython_eval to runtime for eval/exec support
- Document all c_interop functions with STATUS markers
- Remove duplicate hashlib.zig (runtime version is canonical)
- Move stray .zig files into src/ directory
